variables.notes: Applied SG&A hierarchy rule (b): explicit SG&A exists but appears only in one year, so include it plus closest overhead buckets for broader year coverage. Excluded Share-based payments to reduce likely double counting within Staff costs.

variables.notes: Selected the single finance-cost total to avoid double counting against underlying components that appear only in some years. Excluded Net foreign exchange (loss) / gain because it is explicitly non-interest and non-recurring/valuation-like for PROF purposes.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company

Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when separate NCI exists.
Share count, not equity value.

variables.notes: Preferred equity attributable to shareholders, which avoids double counting with separately mapped Non-controlling interests. Included alternate label for 2025 as fallback priority.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance-sheet NCI stock.

variables.notes: Use the balance-sheet non-controlling interests line so BE + MIB reconstructs total equity without double counting.
